seoTitle: Moltema vs Montagu — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Moltema and Montagu. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Moltema and Montagu.
heading: Moltema vs Montagu — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Moltema, Tasmania and Montagu, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Moltema has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Montagu (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Moltema or Montagu safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Moltema has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Montagu scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Moltema scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Montagu scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Moltema or Montagu?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Moltema has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
